goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture'.
Make sure you get 'area', 'postcode', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the 'south'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'postcode', and 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture
Make sure you get area, postcode, and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the south
The hotel should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Make sure you get address, postcode, and star of the hotel
